title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Lombard

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Lombard
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Lombard in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Lombard:
ICICI Lombard is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
